title: The Porkchop Express
description: Funny pigs and birds from video game as a Sable addon.
body:
From Wretched Swines to Furious Poultry, this mod has it all! Play around with beloved characters from your favorite childhood games, DDUUURRR around, or destroy your friends' builds with explosive birds!

- Swines (AKA DURRS): Charge, spin quickly, and release to throw them around! Easter egg if clicked with a music disc.

- Remote Detonator: A remote controlled detonation device used to make certain poultry do something.

- Poultry: Different types of poultry do different things when detonated with a remote detonator.

- Recipes: Check JEI/REI/other. Explosive Poultry is made by clicking a Furious Poultry with gunpowder.
